content: vite-plugin-pwa v1.3.0 is current; supports Vite 3-8. Integrates Workbox internally via generateSW or injectManifest strategies. For React SPAs: use generateSW with runtimeCaching for API routes and stale-while-revalidate for assets. registerSW() prompts user for refresh. For Fase 1 (online-only MVP), minimal service worker config suffices; full offline cache enters Fase 2.
